title: Nether Start Challenge
description: Start your adventure in the Nether. Find a way out to the Overworld!
body:
The 1.16+ Nether now provides you everything you need to survive... But the challenge might be hard... Your goal is to find a way out to the Overworld in classic vanilla survival game! ## Main features - New players are dropped in the nether. - You only have a respawn kit (respawn anchor + 4 glowstone) and a quick fire resistance effect to start your adventure - If you run out of respawns, you will be spread in a new random nether location. - Click on **[ reroll ]** if the dropped location isn't correct (this will clear your inventory). - You can't reach the overworld unless you craft your own nether portal ! (You will always spawn in the nether)
Patreon Supporters - **26.1 (06/04/2026):** Setsu-P, varinyc, nfnpgllxhn - **1.21.11 (22/12/2025):** Azerxim, Setsu-P, varinyc, Wani P, nfnpgllxhn - **1.21.9 (16/10/2025):** CYKLOPPS, Azerxim, varinyc, Setsu-P, Wani P, Lionel Felke - **1.21.5 (2025-06-07):** CYKLOPPS, Azerxim, Setsu-P, varinyc, Wani P - **1.21.2 (2024-11-08):** Screaming Man, ZMH, Darklad32, CYKLOPPS, Azerxim, Aidan McCreary, varinyc, Setsu-P, Maximilian Adler, ODS, Jamie B - **1.21 (2024-06-16):** 아아앨, Screaming Man, ZMH, CYKLOPPS, Darklad32, Memick Kung, Aidan McCreary, EXcore, Setsu-P - **1.20.5 (2024-05-20):** Angelo Russo, 아아앨, EXcore, Screaming Man, ZMH, Darklad32, CYKLOPPS, Memick Kung, Aidan McCreary, Setsu-P - **1.20.4 (2023-12-21):** Angelo Russo, 깔수, Screaming Man, ZMH, Darklad32, CYKLOPPS, God Emperor Leto II Atriedes - **1.20 (2023-06-23):** Delivator, Jonathan Fanelli, Angelo Russo, Phantom-Glitch-Wolf, John Stampe, Screaming Man, Dorian Dejean, ooF, ZMH, Yokie, Deadlot3, Darklad32 - **1.19 (2022-06-19):** - - **1.18 (2021-12-17):** - - **1.16 (2020-05-01):** -
Patreon Version The free versions are designed to be fun and fully playable. The Patreon version is for players and server owners who want more control, comfort, and flexibility through an in-game settings menu to tweak the parameters live, without file editing. Becoming a Gold Patreon also means: - Getting access to every Patreon versions of every projects. - Getting your name listed in each project and on this page (see above). - Supporting long-term development, updates, and new features 💛
Mod Version Mod packaging is designed to be more convenient for your installations. Executed on the server side, it does not need to be installed on the client side. Keep in mind that inside the mod is simply a datapack. In addition, interactions between too many mods can degrade the functioning of one or more mods.
